what_happened: Test failed with TypeError: artifactVersionService.getByVersion is not a function
why: The vi.mock() for artifact-version-service only included getLatest. New code in loop-context-pack.ts called getByVersion, which was absent from the mock factory, so vitest returned undefined instead of a mock function.
fix_applied: Added getByVersion: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(null) to the artifactVersionService mock factory and to the typed mock helper object.
pattern_to_remember: When adding new methods to a service used in tests, also add them to the corresponding vi.mock() factory — every method the code under test calls must exist in the mock or vitest throws TypeError at runtime.
